result.summary: The page is visually functional, but shows minor layout inconsistencies in the carousel navigation and header alignment.

issues.description: The left navigation arrow on the promotional banner overlaps the 'UP TO $250' text.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the padding or position of the navigation arrows to prevent overlapping the text.

issues.description: The search icon button on the top-left has a different height and shape style compared to the neighboring pill-shaped navigation buttons.
issues.suggestion: Align the height and border-radius of the search container to match the 'Home' and 'Tourney' buttons.
